hero.title: Universal Solution for
hero.subtitle: Clean-Lab Laboratory leader in Europe and Africa - Specialist in secure banknote cleaning with advanced SSD solution and spectrophotometry.

about.title: Clean Lab
about.description1: Founded in 2010, Clean Lab operates as an international center of expertise specializing in the cleaning and restoration of banknotes. Our state-of-the-art laboratory uses advanced technologies including the universal SSD solution, Vectrol paste, activation powders and high-performance equipment for the restoration of damaged, charred or discolored banknotes.
about.description2: Our expertise extends to all international currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, etc.) with strict security protocols. We offer a full range of specialized chemicals, activation salts and customized solutions, supported by machines capable of processing large volumes while ensuring confidentiality and optimal results.

feature.title: Why People
feature.experienceDesc: Visible results in less than 48 hours

reseau.title: Our
reseau.paragraph: With partner laboratories strategically located across Europe and Africa, Clean Lab provides comprehensive international coverage. Our network allows us to offer personalized support, adapted to local regulations and capable of handling all volumes, from individuals to financial institutions. Each partner adheres to our high quality and safety standards.

service.title: Our Professional
service.description1: Clean Lab offers comprehensive banknote cleaning and restoration services using patented technologies. Our team of experts masters the most advanced techniques including SSD solutions, spectrophotometry and specialized chemical processes for optimal results on all types of banknotes.
service.description2: Whether you are an individual, a company or an institution, we have the right solution for your specific banknote cleaning and restoration needs.
service.phone: Call us for a free diagnosis

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: How We Work
process.description: A structured process for optimal results at every stage.
process.step1Desc: In-depth analysis of the condition of the banknotes and determination of the appropriate treatment protocol.
process.step2Desc: Application of SSD solutions and stripping techniques with precision and expertise.
process.step3Desc: Rigorous verification and spectrophotometric analysis to guarantee excellence.
process.step4Desc: Discreet and secure return of treated banknotes with detailed intervention report.
